WorkspaceName

The WorkspaceName of the DatasetName.

virtual IWorkspaceName WorkspaceName { get; set; }

Returns

IWorkspaceName

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P><FONT face=Verdana size=2>A workspace name specifies a workspace object and can be used to instantiate it. The workspace is specified using the connection properties for the workspace.&nbsp; </FONT><FONT face=Verdana size=2>A workspace name is a key component of any dataset name for datasets in the workspace.</FONT></P> <P></P>
